docs.title: Typical workflow for routine sole proprietorship operations
docs.text:
As a JDG, you are obligated to issue an invoice (faktura) every month if you provided services to a client, and to pay your taxes.

Taxes are paid every month

ZUS

Pay ZUS and submit ZUS DRA by the 20th of each month

Podatek dochodowy

Income tax — due by the 20th of each month

VAT

If you provide services to a person or entity within Poland — due by the 25th of each month

VAT-UE

If you provide services to a person or entity within the EU — due by the 25th of each month

docs.title: Plan
docs.text:
1. You provide the service.
  2. You issue an invoice (faktura) to the client.

In general, the client does not need to include anything specific in the payment reference. However, it is said that including the invoice number in the bank transfer makes life easier in case of a tax audit.

In the invoice you can describe something like: invoice for "month" and a few line items such as bug fixes, microservice implementation, etc. — roughly 3–4 items.

In the Nazwa towaru lub usługi (name of goods or service) field, you can specify, for example, Software development / Tworzenie oprogramowania (PKWiU 62.01).

  1. You receive payment into your business bank account.
  2. You pay all required taxes and keep the receipts:
    • podatek dochodowy (income tax)
    • ZUS (social security contributions)
    • VAT: if applicable, you can deduct input VAT from purchases against the total VAT owed. Details

A more detailed description of specific operations using the infakt.pl service as an example can be found here.

docs.title: Accounting for exchange rate differences
docs.text:
1. Article by inFakt
  2. Article by Poradnik Przedsiębiorcy
  3. Guide on recording exchange rate differences in inFakt

For a JDG, exchange rate differences (różnice kursowe) arise in two cases:

  1. Transakcyjne różnice kursowe (transactional exchange rate differences)
  2. Różnice kursowe od środków własnych (exchange rate differences on own funds)

In the second case, three methods are used — FIFO, LIFO, and weighted average — where incoming payments to the account form the queue. The calculation method cannot be changed during the tax year.

Exchange rates are taken from the Narodowy Bank Polski (National Bank of Poland).

docs.title: Filing the VAT-UE declaration
docs.text:
Filing the VAT-UE e-declaration is done on the tax office website using an interactive PDF form.

  • First, you need to install Adobe Reader and its extension from here.
  • On the same page at the bottom there are instructions. In short: download the PDF form, open it in Adobe Reader with the installed extension, fill out the form, and use the extension's wizard to sign with your personal data and submit.
  • At the end of the wizard there will be a link to download the UPO (confirmation of submission).

docs.title: What documents to keep
docs.text:
You need to retain accounting documentation and documents related to social insurance (ZUS).

Printing and storing paper copies is NOT required. In Poland, a sole proprietor may keep documentation in electronic form, provided it can be easily printed in chronological order if needed. Therefore, archive this documentation in the cloud for yourself, in case of an audit.

Retention period: until the end of the current calendar year + 5 full calendar years. Even if you close the JDG. Documents related to employee activity require a longer retention period — 10 years, and in some situations this can reach 50 years.

List of documents:

  • The main document for ryczałt is the ewidencja przychodów (revenue ledger). Your accountant fills it out.

  • Additionally, you need to keep documents confirming sales (faktury that you issue) and purchases (faktury issued to you when purchasing goods and services for the business; if there is no faktura, a receipt or ticket can serve as a substitute).

  • For czynny podatnik VAT (active VAT taxpayer): JPK_V7M (monthly) or JPK_V7K (quarterly). These also need to be retained. You cannot download them from the tax office website.

  • VAT declarations, if applicable: VAT UE, VAT-9M, VAT-8, etc.

  • Dowody wewnętrzne (internal evidence documents) — this type of document is used, for example, to record exchange rate differences that arise when you receive payment in a foreign currency.

  • Some sole proprietors may also have an ewidencja środków trwałych (register of fixed assets) — buildings, cars, devices, and other items such as an expensive laptop purchased for the business. More details.

  • Some may have an ewidencja przebiegu pojazdów (vehicle mileage log) — for a car registered to the business.

  • In addition, another large group of documents that need to be retained are declarations and reports submitted to ZUS. You will most likely have ZUS ZZA, ZUS ZUA, ZUS ZCNA, the monthly ZUS DRA, and during the "holiday" month also ZUS RCA. Do not rely on the ZUS website — people have reported in the chat that they were unable to download documents older than two years from it.

  • The annual PIT declaration (though it can be easily downloaded from the Polish tax office website).

  • Documents that confirm the tax deductions (ulgi) you claimed in your annual PIT declaration. These could be invoices for internet service or confirmation of charitable donations, for example.

  • For electronic documents submitted to the tax office or ZUS via the internet, you need to keep proof of submission: UPO for PIT, UPP for ZUS DRA.

docs.title: Zakład Ubezpieczeń Społecznych
docs.text: All entrepreneurs running a JDG in Poland are required to register with the national social insurance institution and pay insurance contributions.

docs.title: Video
docs.text:
Almost everything you wanted to know about ZUS and weren't afraid to ask

Author: Andrei

Video contents:

  • Types of ZUS contributions
  • Differences between składka zdrowotna and other contributions
  • Step-by-step walkthrough with a specific example
  • Switching from Ulga na Start to składki preferencyjne
  • Paying off last year's debt
  • Choosing the składka zdrowotna level at the beginning of the year
  • Nuances of suspending business activity

docs.title: Contribution amounts
docs.text:
ZUS consists of 2 main parts:

  1. Health insurance (Składka zdrowotna)
  2. Social insurance, which includes
    1. Pension insurance (Ubezpieczenie emerytalne)
    2. Disability insurance (Ubezpieczenie rentowe)
    3. Accident insurance (Ubezpieczenie wypadkowe)
    4. Labour Fund and Solidarity Fund (Fundusz pracy i Fundusz Solidarnościowy)
    5. Sickness insurance (Ubezpieczenie chorobowe)

The monthly health insurance contribution is calculated using the formula base rate * 9%. The base rate depends on income:

  1. Income up to 60,000 PLN: The base rate is 60% of the average salary
  2. Income from 60,000 PLN to 300,000 PLN: The base rate is 100% of the average salary
  3. Income above 300,000 PLN: The base rate is 180% of the average salary

In actual numbers for 2026 (the average salary in the enterprise sector for Q4 2025 is 9,228.64 zł), this is:

  1. Income up to 60,000 PLN: 5,537.18 zł
  2. Income from 60,000 PLN to 300,000 PLN: 9,228.64 zł
  3. Income above 300,000 PLN: 16,611.55 zł

Plugging these numbers into the formula, we get the health insurance contributions:

  1. 5,537.18 * 9% = 498.35 zł
  2. 9,228.64 * 9% = 830.58 zł
  3. 16,611.55 * 9% = 1,495.04 zł

It is important to note that when a threshold is exceeded, recalculation applies retroactively to previous months.

Example:

Maksym is taxed under Ryczałt on registered income. In March 2026, Maksym's income exceeded 60,000 PLN, and in October it exceeded 300,000 PLN. What would the annual health insurance contribution calculation look like?

Over the course of the year, Maksym would pay health insurance contributions as follows:

  • January — 498.35 zł,
  • February — 498.35 zł,
  • March — 830.58 zł (exceeded the 60,000 zł threshold),
  • April — 830.58 zł,
  • May — 830.58 zł,
  • June — 830.58 zł,
  • July — 830.58 zł,
  • August — 830.58 zł,
  • September — 830.58 zł,
  • October — 1,495.04 zł (exceeded the 300,000 zł threshold),
  • November — 1,495.04 zł,
  • December — 1,495.04 zł

Over the year, Maksym paid health insurance contributions totalling 11,295.88 PLN: 498.35 * 2 + 830.58 * 7 + 1495.04 * 3.

Since Maksym exceeded the 300,000 PLN threshold for the calendar year, his monthly health insurance contribution should have been 1,495.04 PLN all along. Therefore, the annual contribution is: 1495.04 * 12 = 17,940.48, but the total amount Maksym actually paid from the example above was only 11,295.88 PLN. This means that after the annual reconciliation, Maksym has an outstanding balance on his health insurance. He must pay an additional 6,644.60 PLN: 17,940.48 - 11,295.88.

docs.title: ZUS contributions infographic
docs.text: Visit the website Składki ZUS (ryczałt) (2026).

docs.title: ZUS contribution calculation table
docs.text:
Składki ZUS 2026 Ryczałt A + B + C + D Annual revenue Ulga na start Składki preferencyjne Duży zus A: Składka zdrowotna 0 - 60 000 498,35 60 000.01 - 300 000 830,58 > 300 000 1495,04 B: ubezpieczenie społeczne Emerytalna 0 281,44 1103,27 Rentowa 0 115,34 452,16 Wypadkowa 0 24,08 94,39 Total 0 420,86 1649,82 C: Fundusz Pracy 0 0 138,47 Total (A + B + C): 0 - 60 000 498,35 919,21 2286,64 60 000.01 - 300 000 830,58 1251,44 2618,87 > 300 000 1495,04 1915,90 3283,33 D: Chorobowa (optional) 0 35,32 138,47

The health component (zdrowotna) must always be paid, even if you also have insurance through an employment contract. The health contribution provides access to medical services for the entrepreneur and their family members.

Social benefit entitlements depend on paying the social contributions. These include maternity leave, sick leave, and future pension payments, but these benefits are proportional to the amount on which you pay contributions.

For the first 6 months you can take advantage of the "Ulga na start" relief and not pay social contributions. Accordingly, you will not be able to use social benefits either. After the startup relief expires, you can switch to the next relief — Składki preferencyjne — and use it for 24 months. After 30 months of activity you must switch to paying full ZUS (duży ZUS) — a minimum of 60% of the average salary.

More details at biznes.gov.pl and e-pity

docs.title: Registration
docs.text: An entrepreneur is required to register with ZUS within 7 days of registering a JDG. This can be done either during the business registration process or afterwards.

docs.title: How to find your ZUS payment account
docs.text:
After registering the sole proprietorship, within approximately 2 weeks you should receive a letter (a physical envelope) from ZUS with all account details, etc., and the functionality will appear in your online account at eskladka.pl.

You can also check accounts on the aforementioned website by entering two identifiers: NIP and REGON (or NIP and PESEL).

docs.title: How to pay ZUS
docs.text:
ZUS must be paid by the 20th of the month following the reporting month. For example, ZUS for July is due by August 20th.

Payment should be made via a standard bank transfer to your individual ZUS account. You can write anything in the payment description — it does not affect anything.

docs.title: Certificate of no outstanding ZUS debt
docs.text:
• You can physically go to any ZUS branch (any branch, not necessarily your district's) and obtain all certificates with wet stamps
  • You can do it on the ZUS portal

docs.title: Select the RWN application
docs.text: Go to the Katalog usług elektronicznych website and type RWN into the filter field.

docs.title: Verify the form data
docs.text: You will be redirected to the ZUS wniosek RWN form. Verify the data in the form.

docs.title: Number of certificate copies
docs.text: Select the number of certificate copies and click Zapisz.

docs.title: Review the document and click Wyślij
Sign via Profil Zaufany
docs.text: Click Ok

docs.title: Retrieve the certificate
docs.text:
Once the letter arrives (1–7 days), log into ZUS. In the menu, select Płatnik (sometimes it arrives in the Ogólny tab). On the left, go to Dokumenty i wiadomości then Korespondencja z ZUS. Select the document and confirm receipt via Profil Zaufany.

If you have an authorized representative (e.g. an accountant)

If the entrepreneur has an authorized representative in ZUS, incoming documents — including the certificate of no outstanding debt (RWN) — first arrive in the representative's account, in the Skrzynka odbiorcza section. Until the representative clicks Odbierz, the document will not appear in the payer's account. If the representative does nothing, the document only becomes automatically available to the payer after 14 days. So if the certificate "isn't arriving" — first ask your accountant to accept it in their inbox.

docs.title: Download the certificate
docs.text:
After confirmation, the Szczegóły option will appear.

Open the document via Przeglądaj dokument.

Print via Drukuj.

docs.title: Health insurance certificate
docs.text:
To confirm your health insurance, you can obtain a certificate with an electronic signature on the zus.pl portal.

  1. Go to zus.pl
  2. Select the Ubezpieczony section in the site header
  3. Select Panel Ubezpieczonego in the side menu
  4. Select the Zaświadczenia - ubezpieczenia menu item
  5. Click the Utwórz nowy button at the bottom of the page
  6. Tick the Ubezpieczenie zdrowotne checkbox
  7. Tick the Członkowie rodziny - Wszyscy checkbox (if the certificate is also needed for family members — in case they do not have their own health insurance)
  8. Be sure to click Podgląd to unlock the Zatwierdź button
  9. You can review the opened Podgląd and close it
  10. Click the Zatwierdź button to send the document to ZUS for signing
  11. A new row with the status Oczekuje will appear in the document list. At this moment automated systems are signing the document with an electronic signature. This process takes from a couple of seconds to a couple of minutes.
  12. Click the Odśwież button periodically until the status changes to Wystawiony
  13. Click the Zapisz jako PDF button and choose a location on your device to save the PDF file.
  14. As a result, you will have a genuine electronic document from ZUS, signed with a qualified electronic signature. You can send this document via e-Doręczenia and attach it to MOS2 with a clear conscience. In this case, the electronic document is the original, and the matter is settled.
  15. To make sure the PDF is signed, you can go to any electronic signature verification service, for example, the government document signing website
  16. Click Dodaj plik
  17. A Sprawdź, kto podpisał button will appear on the attached file
  18. The modal window that opens will show information about the authority that signed the document — Zakład Ubezpieczeń Społecznych (ZUS)
  19. Attach this document in MOS2 or any other electronic service whenever you need to prove that you or your family members have insurance.

docs.title: Linking ePUAP to your ZUS profile
docs.text:
1. If you have a profil zaufany, go to Panel ogólny -> Ustawienia -> Dane profilu and click Dodaj powiązanie z ePUAP.
  2. You will be redirected to the trusted profile login page — log in and sign with profilem zaufany.
  3. As a result, your ZUS profile will be linked with profilem zaufanym.

docs.title: ZUS contacts
docs.text:
📞 phone 225601600 📧 email cot@zus.pl 📝 questions form: Formularz kontaktowy 💻 video visit: e-Wizyta (for JDG-related questions, pick topic "Firmy i pracownicy")

There are known technical limitations for iOS / macOS users; if you use another device, e-Wizyta is a good option. Have your karta pobytu or passport ready—you will need to show the document on camera for identity verification.

docs.title: In-person branch visit
docs.text: Find the nearest ZUS branch by postal code: Wyszukiwarka oddziałów ZUS Book ahead: Zamów wizytę w placówce

docs.title: Duży ZUS — full contributions for JDG
Switching to Duży ZUS
docs.text:
When all benefits expire (usually after 24 months of składki preferencyjne), you need to switch to Duży ZUS.

Official website

Jakie składki na ubezpieczenia społeczne płaci przedsiębiorca do ZUS

When to switch to duży ZUS

See Deadlines for switching between regimes

docs.title: What you need to do (in a nutshell)
docs.text:
Have an accountant? Just remind them that your benefits are about to expire. No accountant? Read the instructions below ⬇️

  1. Deregister from ZUS using the ZUS ZWUA form.

  2. Register for insurance with code 0510:

    a. If you're also working under an Umowa o Pracę and your salary is above the minimum, use the ZUS ZZA form;

    b. Otherwise use the ZUS ZUA form. If you're switching from składki preferencyjne to duży ZUS, your old code is 0570 and the new one is 0510.

  3. Switch to duży ZUS in your inFakt/wFirma/iFirma settings.

Each of these steps is described in detail below.

How do I access the ZUS payer online portal?

See available methods.

docs.title: Step 1
docs.text:
In the top right corner, select the ePłatnik tab, then in the left menu choose Rejestr ubezpieczonych -> Aktualni ubezpieczeni.

Click the Podgląd button.

The Kartoteka ubezpieczonego (insured person's file) opens.

docs.title: Step 2
docs.text:
Inside the file you can select the Ubezpieczenia tab.

It shows the current code and the date from which it is effective. The screenshot below shows an example where składki preferencyjne (Składki preferencyjne) are already active and you need to switch to duży ZUS (Duży ZUS).

You can find information about all codes for entrepreneurs in the table.

Click Zmień dane.

On the Obsługa ubezpieczonego tab, a step-by-step form for making changes appears.

On the "Wybierz dane do zmiany" step, check the box next to Dane ubezpieczeń and click Dalej.

docs.title: Step 3
docs.text:
On the "Dane ubezpieczeń" step, click Edytuj.

A popup titled "Zgłoszenie ubezpieczonego → Tytuły ubezpieczeń" appears with the current data.

Update the data in the left column:

  • On the left, change the Kod tytułu ubezpieczenia (insurance type code; remember, for switching to duży ZUS your new code is 05 10).

  • Change the dates on the left side to the first day of the month when Duży ZUS starts (usually the current month). As a result, the ZUS ZUA field Data powstania obowiązku ubezpieczenia (or Data zgłoszenia do ubezpieczenia) will show the same day as in ZUS ZWUA. This way there's no gap in the foreigner's insurance coverage.

  • Below the insurance type code there are 2 sections:

    • Obowiazkowe ubezpieczenia społeczne (Mandatory social insurance contributions). If you had ulga na start, the checkboxes will be empty. In that case, check 3 out of 4 as shown in the screenshot (TODO: does this instruction also apply to those who work on UoP in parallel?):

      • Emerytalnemu
      • Chorobowemu
      • Rentowym
      • Wypadkowemu

    • Obowiązkowe ubezpieczenie zdrowotne (Mandatory health insurance contribution)

Update the data in the right column:

  • On the right, select the Kod wykonywanego zawodu (profession code). This is needed for statistics. See the profession codes table for details.

  • Below the profession code there are 2 more sections:

    • Dobrowolne ubezpieczenia społeczne (Voluntary social insurance contributions).

      • Chorobowym - here you can optionally check the chorobowa contribution to be able to receive sick leave benefits in case of illness. The chorobowa contribution is optional. You can reduce your ZUS payments by 100+ PLN per month by opting out, but then you won't be able to receive sick leave compensation. The choice is yours. According to a poll in the chat, most entrepreneurs opt out. If you do check it, set the date to the first day of the current month accordingly.

    • Dobrowolne ubezpieczenie zdrowotne (Voluntary health insurance contribution). Leave this empty.

  • Click Zapisz

The popup closes and step 4 shows the updated "Dane ubezpieczeń" data. The screenshot below shows an example of switching from Składki preferencyjne to Duży ZUS.

Screenshot translation

ℹ️ Fill in the current data.

Insurance data

Insurance title code Insurance title Date obligation arose ☑ 051000 A person conducting non-agricultural business activity in accordance with the provisions on business activity or other special provisions, who does not have established right to a disability pension due to incapacity for work, for whom the basis for calculating social insurance contributions is a declared amount not lower than 60% of the average monthly salary. This may be a person managing a non-public or public school, institution, or their complex, in accordance with the provisions on the education system, and a person conducting non-agricultural activity in the field of a liberal profession. 2024-10-01

Click Dalej

docs.title: Step 4
docs.text:
On the last step "Utworzenie i walidacja dokumentów", two automatically created documents are shown:

  • ZUS ZUA – for registration with the new code
  • ZUS ZWUA – for formally cancelling the previous registration

Click Weryfikuj to make the Wyślij i zakończ button active.

After verification, ZUA gets an "error" status (Status weryfikacji = Błąd) because the ZWUA application must be processed first and only then ZUA, but this is just a formality — that's how it's supposed to be. In reality, both applications are sent to ZUS simultaneously and processed by a clerk together, in the correct order.

Click Wyślij i zakończ (Send and finish), then sign both applications with a single ePUAP signature.

docs.title: Result
docs.text:
The applications are immediately moved to Dokumenty -> Dokumenty wysłane.

After processing, the data in the file should be updated (see screenshot 2).

You can also verify that all previously added family members are still listed under the Członkowie rodziny tab in the file.

After some time, the applications will appear in Dokumenty w ZUS.

docs.title: Switching your accounting service settings
docs.text:
Try not to let your ZUS settings on zus.pl get out of sync with the ZUS settings in your accounting software. So after you've reported the switch to duży ZUS in ZUS, go into your software settings.

This month you'll be sending several different declarations to ZUS:

DRA

ZUS payment and submission of ZUS DRA from the 1st to the 20th of the month following the reporting period.

ZWUA and ZUA/ZZA

ZUS ZWUA and ZUS ZUA/ZZA must be submitted to ZUS from the 1st to the 7th of the month in which you stopped using benefits.

Because of this, many entrepreneurs wonder:

Does the order of submitting declarations matter?

No. It doesn't matter in what order you do these things. Just meet the deadlines.

It's recommended to change settings in inFakt/iFirma/wFirma after you've submitted the documents listed above.

docs.title: UPP - submission confirmation
docs.text: See UPP.

docs.title: Common mistakes
docs.text:
See error collection.

Buy the author a coffee

docs.title: Login-related
docs.text:
Login

The zus.pl website won't log you into your account! It hangs on Logowanie... or kicks you back to the login page:

Try the following solutions:

  1. Clear your cookies (How to delete cookies for the zus site?).
  2. Log into ZUS using a different browser.
  3. Log into ZUS via an incognito tab (How to use incognito mode in Google Chrome?).
  4. Sometimes ZUS hangs on the loading screen, but if you go back to the previous page https://www.zus.pl/ezus/ and try logging in again, it works.
  5. Wait it out. eZUS sometimes has technical issues and there's nothing you can do about it.

docs.title: Related to switching between contribution modes
docs.text:
⚠️ What to do if you missed the deadline for switching to składki preferencyjne? If an entrepreneur misses the 7-day deadline, there is nothing preventing them from doing it later. Do it now, as soon as possible. Keep in mind that failing to meet the legally established reporting deadline is a violation of the provisions of the Act on the Social Insurance System (ustawy o systemie ubezpieczeń społecznych) and is punishable by a fine. (Source) ⚠️ Important note for wFirma users To avoid problems with switching modes in wFirma, you should first submit the ZUS DRA for the sixth month of ulga na start and only then proceed with the switch. This matches the algorithm in the guide.

When verifying a form, look for the result on the uwagi i błędy tab. Here's a screenshot for reference: Let's collect the most common errors and their solutions on this page together!

If you submitted ZUS ZUA before ZUS ZWUA was processed, you may see an error like this:

Error text:

Nie możesz wysłać zgłoszenia z kodem z grupy 05xx, jeżeli jest jeszcze niewyrejstrowany okres podlegania z kodem 05XX. Jeśli wysłałeś dokument ZWUA, poczekaj z wysłaniem nowego zgłoszenia na przetworzenie dokumentu ZWUA w ZUS. (blok V pole 1) Błąd zwykły

This message says you need to wait until ZUS ZWUA is processed. But actually, you don't have to wait — you can submit it with the error. The declaration will still be processed correctly.

When verifying the ZUS DRA declaration for the last month of Ulga na Start, you will likely see a status of «Informacja» and a message «Zbliża się koniec okresu ulgi (blok X pole 1)» on the uwagi i błędy tab. This is normal — ZUS is simply informing you that the relief period is ending and you need to prepare for switching to the next contribution mode.

Info

This is not a blocking error: there is nothing to fix, you can safely submit and pay the declaration.

When verifying the ZUS DRA declaration for the last month of Ulga na Start, you see a message «dla ubezpieczonego brak zgłoszenia z podanym kodem tytułu».

On the uwagi i błędy tab there is an error with code 69004101 and text «brak raportu za ubezpieczonego zgłoszonego przez płatnika».

The error indicates a mismatch between the insurance code you reported to ZUS and the insurance code specified on the ZUS DRA declaration.

possible cause

This can happen, for example, if an entrepreneur already switched to skladki preferencyjne at the beginning of October (including changing wFirma settings), but the previous month should still be covered by the relief.

solution

Try this solution:

  1. Delete the incorrect ZUS DRA in wFirma;
  2. Switch wFirma settings back to Ulga na Start;
  3. Regenerate the ZUS DRA;
  4. After successfully submitting the DRA to ZUS, switch the settings back to preferencyjne contributions.

Unfortunately, wFirma does not keep a history of setting changes.

Source: message from Oksana Sviderska

docs.title: Other errors
docs.text:
If you encounter an error that is not yet documented, or the suggested solutions don't work, reach out directly to ZUS or ask in the JDG in Poland chat.

How to ask your question properly?

Include all important information in your question — everything that is relevant and that you think matters. The chat admins have prepared a checklist for you. If you're not sure how to answer some of these, just say so — other chat members will help you out.

  • What are you trying to do?
  • Which form are you filling out?
  • At which step does the question / problem / error occur?
  • The error text in Polish.
  • The error code. When verifying a ZUS form, look for the result on the uwagi i błędy tab.
  • A screenshot of the error and a screenshot of the step(s) preceding the error.
  • Have you already tried any possible solutions on your own?
  • Tax regime? Possible answers:
    1. ryczałt — flat-rate tax
    2. podatek liniowy — linear tax 19%
    3. skala podatkowa or opodatkowanie na zasadach ogólnych — general tax scale 0 / 12% / 32%
  • When was the first day of your business activity? DATE.
  • Do you combine self-employment with a regular job? (note: part of the contributions is paid by the employer; this is about umowa o pracę or umowa zlecenie)
  • Are you a retiree or a person with a disability?
  • Do you calculate monthly contributions based on the current year's income or the previous year's?
  • Which reliefs are you using? Possible answers:
    1. Ulga na Start (first 6 months);
    2. Składki Preferencyjne (next 24 months);
    3. Mały ZUS+ (income up to 120 000 zł);
    4. Wakacje składkowe (1-month holiday from ZUS contributions);
    5. Duży ZUS — full contributions, no reliefs.

    You can check this as follows

    Go to ZUS - Ubezpieczony - and look up your insurance code.

  • Did you consent to paying sickness insurance contributions (składka chorobowa)?

    You can check this as follows

    Go to ZUS - ePłatnik - Dokumenty w ZUS and find your most recent ZUS ZUA. If the ZUS ZUA had the składki chorobowe checkbox ticked (block VIII field 05), it means you signed up for these voluntary additional contributions.

  • (for ryczałt) your annual income falls in the range: up to 60000 zł, from 60000 zł to 300000 zł, above 300000 zł. Specify which year you are answering about, or provide income for both the previous and current year.

  • Share a screenshot of the ZUS settings from the accounting service you use (inFakt, wFirma, iFirma) in the chat.
  • If you did not register as a sole trader and are running działalność nierejestrowa, make sure to mention that in your question as well.
  • Did you receive a letter from ZUS? What does it say?
  • Did you receive a reply from ZUS? And how was your original question worded?

docs.title: Login
docs.text:
You can get into eZUS using any of these options that work for foreigners:

  • login and password
  • Profil Zaufany
  • through your bank

If one of them is flaky right now, just try another.

Still can't get into eZUS?

See possible causes and fixes.

docs.title: Moving to the next ZUS regime
General info on start-up relief for businesses
docs.text: When you first run a business in Poland, you can use several ZUS contribution regimes one after another: first Ulga na start, then Składki preferencyjne, then Mały ZUS+ (if you meet the conditions), and finally Duży ZUS. Each regime has its own deadlines, switching rules, and reporting codes. Stick to the filing deadlines when you change regime — that way you avoid fines and reporting mistakes.

docs.title: Typical entrepreneur lifecycle
docs.text:
Starting point: you’re opening your first business in Poland or you haven’t run a business for a long time (you closed your previous company more than 60 months ago).

  1. With income up to 75% of the minimum wage, no contributions at all (Działalność nierejestrowa = unregistered activity).
  2. After registration, the first 6 full calendar months are Ulga na Start (6 full months plus a partial month if you didn’t open on the 1st).
  3. After Ulga na Start ends, you can move to Składki Preferencyjne (the next 24 months).
  4. After that, if income is still low, you can use Mały ZUS+ for 36 months.
  5. When every relief is used up, you must pay Duży ZUS in full.

From the “third level” onward, you can also take one month off ZUS per year.

docs.title: Deadlines when switching between regimes
docs.text:
• The switch always applies from the 1st of the month. You have 7 days to file. If the last day is a weekend or holiday, the deadline moves to the next business day. Don’t leave it to the last minute.
  • If you miss the deadline, you can still file later — there’s a small risk of a fine.

📅 Use our spreadsheet with key dates. Enter your real business start date and get a personalised timeline for free. Then add reminders in your calendar so you don’t miss these dates.

So: start the switch no earlier than the 1st of the month you already intend to pay social contributions at the new rate for — but don’t drag your feet, either, so you finish the switch before the 8th.

docs.title: ZUS insurance title codes (table)
docs.text:
Kod tytułu ubezpieczenia(Current value) What it means What to do New code 054000 Ulga na start Switch to Składki preferencyjne 057000 057000 Składki preferencyjne Switch to Mały ZUS+ (see conditions) 059000 Or switch to Duży ZUS 051000 059000 Mały ZUS+ Switch to Duży ZUS 051000 051000 Duży ZUS Full contributions, no relief Nothing —

The table lists the most common insurance codes among sole traders. For more codes with the original descriptions, see List of ZUS insurance codes (2025).

docs.title: Profession codes table
docs.text:
You’ll need to enter Kod wykonywanego zawodu (code of the profession you perform).

Code Profession (PL) Profession (EN) 251401 Programista Software developer 251402 Programista aplikacji mobilnych Mobile app developer 251903 Tester oprogramowania komputerowego Software tester 243106 Specjalista do spraw marketingu i handlu Marketing and sales specialist

Official site

All codes are in the profession description search tool (Wyszukiwarka opisów zawodów).

If you haven’t changed your line of business and just want to use the same code as before but forgot it, you can look it up in your original ZUS ZZA application on zus.pl: open e-Płatnik, go to Dokumenty → Dokumenty w ZUS, tick ZUS ZZA in the list, click Podgląd. In the document, find section V. TYTUŁ UBEZPIECZENIA I KOD WYKONYWANEGO ZAWODU and check item 02. Kod wykonywanego zawodu.

docs.title: How to switch between ZUS regimes
docs.text:
You can do it online — no need to visit a ZUS office.

First log in to eZUS as described here.

Then pick the step-by-step guide you need and follow it.

1. Activating Ulga na Start

  • When you register your JDG, register with ZUS using ZUS ZZA and pick the right code (0540 00).
  • More detail: Ulga na Start — conditions and quirks
  • Walkthrough: JDG registration

2. Switching to Składki Preferencyjne

  • After 6 months of Ulga na Start, file the switch to the next relief (code 0570 00).
  • Walkthrough: Switching to Składki Preferencyjne

3. Switching to Mały ZUS+

  • After the preferential period ends (24 months preferencyjne), some of you — those who meet the conditions — can switch to Mały ZUS+ (code 0590 00).
  • Walkthrough: TODO

4. Switching to Duży ZUS

  • After the relief period ends (24 months preferencyjne or 36 months Mały ZUS+), switch to Duży ZUS (code 0510 00).
  • Walkthrough: Switching to Duży ZUS

5. ZUS “holiday”

  • If you’re no longer on Ulga na Start, you can take one month per year without paying social contributions (“holiday”).
  • More detail: ZUS holiday — conditions and walkthrough

docs.title: UPP — proof of submission
docs.text:
UPP = Urzędowe Poświadczenie Przedłożenia — the proof that ZUS received your declaration, generated by zus.pl. Without a UPP you can’t reliably prove printed ZUS ZUA / ZUS ZZA forms are authentic.

To prove you’re insured with ZUS, the Potwierdzenie ubezpieczenia certificate is usually better. See the residence permit document checklist.

If someone else filed ZZA/ZUA for you, ask them for the original declaration and its UPP.

docs.title: If you use eZUS
docs.text:
To get Urzędowe Poświadczenie Przedłożenia (UPP) in eZUS (formerly PUE ZUS):

  1. Go to eZUS and sign in.
  2. In the main menu open Dokumenty i wiadomości Korespondencja z ZUS.
  3. Open Dokumenty wysłane.
  4. Find the declaration and click Szczegóły.
  5. In the window you can:
    • View the document,
    • Export it to disk,
    • View the submission proof (Poświadczenie przedłożenia).
  6. To download the UPP, choose Pokaż poświadczenie przedłożenia and click Eksportuj.

TODO: the text does not match the screenshot! needs investigation.

If you can’t find the UPP on eZUS, check your accounting software’s help.

docs.title: If you use iFirma
docs.text:
In iFirma the document is easy to find:

Deklaracje → e-Deklaracje ZUS → table Deklaracje zgłoszeniowe → the declaration is in the Deklaracja column → download the UPP with the PDF button in the rightmost column.

docs.title: Typical mistakes
docs.text: If something goes wrong, check our error collection first.

docs.title: Links
docs.text:
• Official source on transition deadlines: Pas startowy dla początkujących firm
  • Tool to look up profession and specialty codes

docs.title: Switching to "Obniżone składki"
docs.text:
After 6 full months of using Ulga na start, you can take advantage of reduced ZUS contributions (the "Obniżone składki" benefit, also known as Składki preferencyjne) for 24 full months. The benefit is that the minimum social contributions are calculated based on 30% of the minimum wage.

Official website

Obniżone składki ZUS przez 24 miesiące

When to switch to składki preferencyjne

See Deadlines for switching between regimes

docs.title: What you need to do (in a nutshell)
docs.text:
Got an accountant? Just remind them that your Ulga na Start is about to expire. No accountant? Read the instructions below ⬇️

  1. Deregister from ZUS using the ZUS ZWUA form.

  2. Register for insurance:

    a. If you're working simultaneously under Umowa o Pracę and earning above the minimum wage, use the ZUS ZZA form;

    b. Otherwise use the ZUS ZUA form with the new code 0570 xx. If you're switching from ulga na start to składki preferencyjne, your old code is: 0540, and the new one is: 0570.

  3. Switch the settings in inFakt/wFirma/iFirma to składki preferencyjne.

Each of these steps is described in detail below.

How to access the ZUS payer's online portal?

See available methods.

docs.title: Step 1
docs.text:
On the zus.pl page, in the e-Płatnik tab, open the Dodaj dokument window → select a new document of type ZUS ZWUA → click Wybierz → in the dialog that appears, click Przejdz do kreatora.

Next, in the Obsługa ubezpieczonego window, for Cel obsługi select Wyrejestrowanie ubezpieczonego (Deregistration of the insured person). Then click Dalej.

docs.title: Step 2
docs.text:
Next, on the step Wyrejestrowanie » Dane do wyrejestrowania ubezpieczonych, you need to specify the reason and date of deregistration.

In the Przyczyna wyrejestrowania field, select 600 - inna przyczyna wyrejestrowania, and in the Data wyrejestrowania field — the first day of the month in which Ulga na Start is no longer active (if you're doing everything on time, this is the current month). Leave the remaining fields empty.

Click Dalej.

docs.title: Step 3
docs.text: Next, select the person being deregistered with Kod tytułu ubezpieczenia 054000 and click Dalej.

docs.title: Step 4
docs.text:
ZUS automatically generates a set of documents: not only the ZWUA is created, but also a ZCNA for removing dependents from the register.

Important!

To avoid having to re-add dependents after registration, do NOT send the ZCNA in the next step!

docs.title: Step 5
docs.text:
Review, verify, and send the ZWUA document to ZUS.

TODO: help make this guide better! add your screenshots here.

docs.title: Step 6
docs.text:
If you have dependents: go to Dokumenty -> Dokumenty robocze, select the ZCNA and delete them using the Usuń button.

TODO: help make this guide better! add your screenshots here.

docs.title: 2. Registration (ZUS ZUA) with code 05 70
docs.text: Don't rush to submit the ZUA application right after the ZWUA — until the manual processing of the first application is complete, ZUS won't let you send the second one. Wait, it usually takes 1-2 days.

docs.title: Step 1
docs.text:
On the zus.pl page, in the e-Płatnik tab, open the Dodaj dokument window → select a new document of type ZUS ZUA → click Wybierz → in the dialog that appears, click Przejdz do kreatora.

Next, in the Obsługa ubezpieczonego window, for Cel obsługi select Zgłoszenie ubezpieczonego (Registration of the insured person). Then click Dalej.

docs.title: Step 2
docs.text:
On the step "Zgłoszenie ubezpieczonego » Dane identyfikacyjne i ewidencyjne" fill in Dane identyfikacyjne and Dane ewidencyjne in both tabs. You can load the data already on file with ZUS by clicking "Wybierz z kartoteki".

Should you provide your passport?

It's recommended to leave the Typ dokumentu and Seria i numer dokumentu fields empty. It's enough to provide your PESEL.

docs.title: Step 3
docs.text:
On the step "Zgłoszenie ubezpieczonego Adres ubezpieczonego" check your addresses.

  • Adres zameldowania - registered address:

  • Adres zamieszkania - residential address:

  • Adres do korespondencji - correspondence address.

Click Dalej.

docs.title: Step 4
docs.text:
On the screen "Zgłoszenie ubezpieczonego » Tytuły ubezpieczeń" you need to click Dodaj kod tytułu ubezpieczenia.

Here, select Kod tytułu ubezpieczenia. As a reminder, if you're switching to składki preferencyjne, choose code 05 70.

In the left column, fill in Data powstania obowiązku ubezpieczenia (or Data zgłoszenia do ubezpieczenia): the first day of the month in which the new benefit takes effect (if you're doing everything on time, this is the current month). It's important that this is the same day as for ZUS ZWUA. This way a foreigner has no gap in insurance coverage.

Click Zatwierdź.

In the Wybór schematu podlegania window, select the appropriate insurance affiliation scheme. If you have no other sources of social insurance besides your sole proprietorship, leave the default scheme (highlighted in the screenshot).

Screenshot translation

Below are the correct insurance affiliation schemes for the selected insurance title code. The default scheme is shown in bold. Other schemes are due to overlapping insurance title codes.

Emerytalne Rentowe Chorobowe Wypadkowe Zdrowotne ☑ M M V M M

Legend: M - mandatory contribution V - voluntary contribution

In the Kod tytułu ubezpieczenia window, in the left column:

  • Select the required items in the Obowiązkowe ubezpieczenia społeczne (Mandatory social insurance) section. You need to check 3 out of 4 as shown in the picture (TODO: does this instruction apply to those who work under UoP in parallel?):

    • Emerytalnemu
    • Chorobowemu
    • Rentowym
    • Wypadkowemu

  • Obowiązkowe ubezpieczenie zdrowotne (Mandatory health insurance). Should be filled in.

In the same window, in the right column:

  • Dobrowolne ubezpieczenia społeczne (Voluntary social insurance).

    • Chorobowym - here you can optionally check the chorobowa contribution to be able to receive sick pay in case of illness. The chorobowa contribution is optional. You can reduce your ZUS payments by 30+ PLN per month if you opt out of this contribution, but then you won't be able to get sick pay compensation in case of illness. The decision is yours. According to a poll in the chat, most entrepreneurs opt out of it. If you check this box, set the date accordingly — the first day of the current month.

  • Dobrowolne ubezpieczenie zdrowotne (Voluntary health insurance). Leave empty.

Don't forget to select Kod wykonywanego zawodu in the right section. This is needed for statistics. For more details, see the profession codes table.

Click "Dodaj".

In the dialog that appears, click "OK".

Screenshot translation

Information The insurance type selections you made have caused a change to the previously selected affiliation scheme.

On the step "Zgłoszenie ubezpieczonego » Tytuły ubezpieczeń" select the insured person (ubezpieczonego) you just created with code 057000.

Screenshot translation

Registration of the insured » Insurance titles step 4 of 5

Insurance title code Insurance title Date of obligation arising ☑ 057000 Person conducting non-agricultural business activity, without an established right to a disability pension, for whom the basis for calculating insurance contributions is a declared amount not lower than 30% of the minimum wage 2021-12-01

Click Dalej.

docs.title: Step 5
docs.text:
Review, verify, and send the document to ZUS.

TODO: help make this guide better! add your screenshots here.

docs.title: Step 6
docs.text: Wait for ZUS to process the application. If everything is OK, it should look like this:

docs.title: 3. Switching accounting software settings
docs.text:
Try not to let your ZUS settings on zus.pl get out of sync with the ZUS settings in your accounting software. So after you've reported the switch to the new benefit in ZUS, go into your software settings.

This month you'll be sending several different declarations to ZUS:

DRA

Pay ZUS and send the ZUS DRA between the 1st and 20th of the month following the reporting period.

ZWUA and ZUA/ZZA

ZUS ZWUA and ZUS ZUA/ZZA must be sent to ZUS between the 1st and 7th of the month in which you started using the składki preferencyjne benefit.

Because of this, many beginning entrepreneurs have a question:

Does the order of sending declarations matter?

No. It doesn't matter in what order you do these things. Just stick to the deadlines.

It's recommended to change the settings in inFakt/iFirma/wFirma after you've sent the documents listed above.

docs.title: wFirma
docs.text:
wFirma users should pay special attention to the order of operations.

After switching to składki preferencyjne in the settings, wFirma will generate the ZUS DRA as if the previous month also had składki preferencyjne (without ulga na start). Because of this, ZUS will refuse to accept the declaration with an incorrect code and contribution amount (error 69004101).

So it's better to do it this way:

  1. first, generate the ZUS DRA for the previous month (your last DRA with ulga na start);
  2. send the DRA to ZUS;
  3. pay ZUS (this step can be done earlier or later — doesn't matter);
  4. only after that, switch ZUS in wFirma settings to składki preferencyjne.

📚 Source: Koniec ulgi na start - przejście na preferencyjne składki ZUS

Hint

The wFirma calendar will tell you when to switch the settings.

Ustawienia => Podatki => ZUS

Replace "Tylko zdrowotne — 6-miesięczna ulga na start" with "2-letni preferencyjny ZUS".

Exception: if you run your business in parallel with employment under Umowa o Pracę (UoP), and your UoP salary is at or above the minimum wage, then your employer pays the składki społeczne for you. In this case you're exempt from paying składki społeczne for yourself as JDG — choose "Tylko zdrowotne — 2-letni preferencyjny ZUS". You did submit ZUS ZZA in the previous step, right? The same applies to entrepreneurs who receive a pension.

docs.title: UPP - sending confirmation
docs.text: See UPP.

docs.title: Common mistakes
docs.text: See error collection.

docs.title: Ulga na Start — ZUS relief for new sole traders
Ulga na Start
docs.text:
New entrepreneurs can get a ZUS payment benefit: you pay only the health contribution (składka zdrowotna) and you do not pay social contributions (składki społeczne) for the first six full months of running your business.

Official site

Ulga na start – 6 miesięcy bez składek na ubezpieczenie społeczne

docs.title: How to turn the relief on
docs.text:
You need to enter code 05 40 on the ZUS ZZA declaration when you register with ZUS.

See the step-by-step walkthrough in JDG registration.

docs.title: How long "Ulga na start" lasts
docs.text:
If you start your business on the first day of a month, the relief lasts for six months, including the month you registered.

If you registered on any other day of the month, the relief lasts for six full months plus the partial month when you registered. That split is a legit way to stretch the calendar a bit.

docs.title: Who qualifies for Ulga na Start
docs.text:
Per the official rules, you can use Ulga na Start only if all three of these are true at the same time:

  1. You are a natural person — you register a sole proprietorship (JDG) or you are a partner in a civil partnership (spółka cywilna).
  2. You are starting business for the first time or you resume it no sooner than 60 months (five years) after the last suspension or closure.
  3. You are not working for a former employer — you do not provide services or work under contract for someone you were employed by under an employment contract (umowa o pracę) in the current or previous calendar year if those services match what you used to do for them.

Heads up!

Pay attention to condition 2. If you simply close JDG and open it again with a gap of 1 to 59 months, you cannot use Ulga na Start. You will pay full ZUS.

docs.title: Edge-case example
docs.text:
Can you use Ulga na Start if you worked as a tester under an employment contract (UoP) and now you open JDG and do programming for the same employer?

What matters: your JDG activity must not match what you did under the employment contract. If you were officially a tester and you now contract for programming, you formally stay inside the relief rules.

Polish practice has write-ups of similar cases. For example, if someone was a manager and then became a developer-entrepreneur serving the same employer — relief can still apply if the new activity is different from the old one (see source).

  • Case write-up: working with a former employer and eligibility for ZUS reliefs (PL)

docs.title: Important
docs.text:
• If you start providing services in the same line of work as under the employment contract, Ulga na Start does not apply.
  • If the profile is different, relief may be possible — but it helps to have paperwork (scope of services, occupation codes, etc.).

docs.title: UPP — proof of submission
docs.text:
UPP = Urzędowe Poświadczenie Przedłożenia — the submission receipt ZUS generates on zus.pl for a filed declaration.

Many people register with ZUS at the same time as JDG on biznes.gov.pl. You can usually get the ZZA file the site generates, but you cannot get a UPP file for it. Without UPP you cannot formally prove printed forms are authentic.

So for proving ZUS coverage, people often use the Potwierdzenie ubezpieczenia certificate instead. Details in the residence permit document checklist.

If ZUS ZZA was filed other than through biznes.gov.pl, ask whoever submitted it for the original declaration and its UPP. More in the guide.

docs.title: ZUS Vacation (Wakacje od ZUS) for JDG
ZUS VACATION: Everything Entrepreneurs in Poland Need to Know
docs.text:
Starting from November 1, 2024, sole proprietors in Poland (JDG) can take advantage of the so-called "ZUS vacation" ("Wakacje od ZUS"), meaning they can get an exemption from paying social contributions ("składki społeczne") for one month per year.

First and foremost, this new benefit should interest entrepreneurs who pay Duży ZUS. If your Ulga na Start hasn't ended yet, you can skip the details for now and come back to this topic later.

docs.title: Eligibility for ZUS Vacation
docs.text:
To receive the exemption, you must meet the following requirements:

  • During the month preceding the application month, the entrepreneur must have been insured in ZUS for at least 1 day.
  • For the month preceding the application month, the entrepreneur must have paid the contributions they want to be exempted from. (i.e. you can't game the system and have the state pay your voluntary składka chorobowa during the vacation if you weren't paying it yourself before that)
  • Have no more than 9 employees.
  • Annual turnover below 2 million euros.
  • The entrepreneur did not provide services to a former employer for whom, in the year of business registration and the year prior, they worked under an employment contract (w ramach stosunku pracy) or another contract (spółdzielczego stosunku pracy), in the same field as their current business activity.
  • Has not already used ZUS vacation this year.

docs.title: Which Contributions Are Exempt
docs.text:
ZUS vacation exempts you from paying social contributions:

  • mandatory składki społeczne for yourself: emerytalne, rentowe i wypadkowe;
  • voluntary ubezpieczenie chorobowe;
  • contributions to the Fundusz Pracy and Fundusz Solidarnościowy.

In terms of numbers, the ZUS vacation savings work out the same as the "Ulga na Start" benefit. Keep in mind that the health insurance contribution ("składka zdrowotna") must be paid regardless.

docs.title: How to Apply for ZUS Vacation
docs.text: You can only apply online through the PUE ZUS / eZUS portal. The original version of this guide was developed by Olga Korneva.

docs.title: Creating the Document
docs.text: Go to the Płatnik panel (top right), then select - Dokumenty i wiadomości (left column) - Dokumenty robocze, and at the bottom click Utwórz nowy.

docs.title: Selecting RWS
docs.text: At this step, you need to find the right application form. First, increase the number of documents per page (at the bottom, select 50 or 100) and scroll to find the form, or page through and look for: Wniosek RWS - Wniosek o zwolnienie z obowiązku opłacenia składek za wskazany miesiąc. Select it and click Utwórz dokument at the bottom.

docs.title: Selecting the Type
docs.text:
Select the document type Wniosek.

The screenshot shows the first of 3 available options:

  • Application
  • Amendment / correction of the application
  • Withdrawal of the application

Click Dalej to proceed to the next screen.

docs.title: Personal Information
docs.text: Fill in the JDG information. It will most likely be pre-filled already; you can optionally add a phone number.

docs.title: Selecting the Indicated Month
docs.text:
Request content

I am requesting an exemption from paying social insurance contributions and the Labour Fund and Solidarity Fund for the month:

Month 1 Year 2025

If you are not required to pay contributions to the Labour Fund and the Solidarity Fund for the month you indicated in your application, we will consider your application only with regard to the exemption from paying social insurance contributions.

docs.title: Declaring the Use of De Minimis Aid
docs.text:
ZUS vacation is a form of de minimis aid, which means the entrepreneur must declare all government subsidies and business benefits received during the current year. The total de minimis aid limit is 300,000 euros over three years.

Quote

I declare that:

  • for the last two calendar years preceding the year of application, I did not receive income from non-agricultural economic activity, or in at least one year of the last two calendar years preceding the year of application, I received annual income from non-agricultural economic activity that did not exceed the equivalent in zlotys of 2 million euros;
  • as an insured person in the calendar year preceding the year of application and from the beginning of the calendar year in which I submit the application until the date of its submission, I did not conduct non-agricultural business activity for a former employer for whom, in the calendar year of starting business activity or in the previous calendar year, I performed, within the framework of employment or cooperative employment relationships, activities falling within the scope of the business activity;
  • Over the past 3 years:
    • I did not use de minimis state aid
    • I used de minimis public aid To confirm the amount of state aid received, I am providing:
    • a declaration
    • certificates

Before submitting the application, attach the certificates as appendices. You will be able to do this on the last page of the creator.

I am aware of criminal liability for making a false declaration.

In the example, the option with using state aid is checked — specifically, using ZUS vacation in the previous calendar year. Select the option that applies to you.

docs.title: FAQ
docs.text:
A common question from people who aren't sure: "what if I received de minimis aid and just don't know?"

You will know if you received such aid: the entire amount must be strictly accounted for to avoid exceeding the three-year threshold, so any body providing such aid is required to issue a certificate of aid with a specific date and amount. Additionally, there is a register of entrepreneurs who received aid, where you can look yourself up. Enter your NIP, click the button to select the time range pełne 3 lata wstecz, check the field tylko de minimis, and then click Wyszukaj według wybranych kryteriów. A file will be generated listing all individually received benefits along with their total sum.

"Where do I get the de minimis aid certificate?"

In PUE ZUS, panel Platnik - Dokumenty i wiadomości - Skrzynka odbiorcza. In the list of received documents, find all relevant documents named RWS - Informacja o przyznaniu zwolnienia. For each such document, go to Szczegóły.

On the Szczegóły panel, in the Załączniki section, look for the document Zaświadczenie_rws-r-zasw.pdf. To download the document, click Pobierz. Adding documents is described in the last step of filling out the application.

docs.title: Entrepreneur Categories
docs.text:
Translation of the content with category explanations

Translation

Entity size

The size of the organization in accordance with Annex I to Commission Regulation (EU) No 651/2014 of June 17, 2014, recognizing certain types of aid as compatible with the internal market in accordance with Articles 107 and 108 of the Treaty (regulation).

Micro entrepreneur — an entrepreneur who, for at least one of the last two financial years, cumulatively met the following conditions:

  • had an average of fewer than 10 employees;
  • achieved net annual turnover from the sale of goods, products, and services, as well as from financial operations, not exceeding the equivalent in zlotys of 2 million euros, or the total assets on their balance sheet prepared at the end of one of those years did not exceed the equivalent in zlotys of 2 million euros.

Small entrepreneur — who, for at least one of the last two financial years, cumulatively met the following conditions:

  • had an average of fewer than 50 employees;
  • achieved net annual turnover from the sale of goods, products, and services, as well as from financial operations, not exceeding the equivalent in zlotys of 10 million euros, or the total assets on their balance sheet prepared at the end of one of those years did not exceed the equivalent in zlotys of 10 million euros, and — is not a micro entrepreneur.

Medium entrepreneur — who, for at least one of the last two financial years, cumulatively met the following conditions:

  • had an average of fewer than 250 employees;
  • achieved net annual turnover from the sale of goods, products, and services, as well as from financial operations, not exceeding the equivalent in zlotys of 50 million euros, or the total assets on their balance sheet prepared at the end of one of those years did not exceed the equivalent in zlotys of 43 million euros, and — is not a micro entrepreneur or a small entrepreneur.

Other entrepreneur — who does not fall into any of the above categories.

In the example, Micro entrepreneur is selected. This is the only correct answer in the sense that if you have 10 or more employees, ZUS vacation is not for you. Select the option that applies to you.

docs.title: Activity Class
docs.text:
Translation

Indicate the PKD of the activity for which you are subject to social insurance in the Social Insurance Fund. Activity class, in accordance with the Regulation of the Council of Ministers of December 18, 2024 on the Polish Classification of Activities (PKD = the Polish equivalent of industry classification codes) (Dz. U. z 2024 r. poz. 1936)

In the popup window, select the appropriate activity code.

In the example, activity code 62.10.B is selected (other software development activities). Select the option that applies to you.

docs.title: Relationships with Other Entrepreneurs
docs.text:
Translation

Is there a relationship between the entity and other entrepreneurs, consisting of the fact that:

  • one entrepreneur holds a majority of voting rights of shareholders or partners of the other entrepreneur;
  • one entrepreneur has the right to appoint or dismiss a majority of the members of the management or supervisory body of the other entrepreneur;
  • one entrepreneur has the right to exercise dominant influence over the other entrepreneur under a contract concluded with that entrepreneur or under its founding documents;
  • one entrepreneur, who is a shareholder, founder, or member of the other entrepreneur, independently controls most of the voting rights of that entrepreneur under an agreement with other shareholders, partners, or founders;
  • the entrepreneur is in any of the relationships described above through one or more other entrepreneurs.

In the example, all categories are marked as negative. If even one answer is TAK, you will need to provide the NIP numbers of the other entrepreneurs, as well as the amount of de minimis aid. Select the options that apply to you.

docs.title: Information About the Entity's Origin
docs.text:
Translation

In the past 3 years, the entity:

  • was created as a result of a merger of other entrepreneurs;
  • accepted/took over another entrepreneur;
  • was formed as a result of a split of another entrepreneur;
  • was created as a result of a transformation of an entrepreneur.

In the example, all categories are marked as negative. If even one answer is TAK, you will need to provide the NIP of the other entrepreneur, as well as the amount of de minimis aid. Select the options that apply to you.

docs.title: Information About Specific Activity Categories
docs.text:
Translation

Information about business activity conducted by the entity to which de minimis aid is to be granted

Does the organization to which de minimis aid is to be granted conduct activity:

  • in the primary production sector for fishery and aquaculture products;
  • in the primary production of agricultural products listed in Annex I to the Treaty on the Functioning of the EU;
  • in the processing and marketing of agricultural products listed in Annex I to the Treaty on the Functioning of the EU;
  • in the processing and marketing of fishery and aquaculture products.

In the example, all categories are marked as negative. Select the options that apply to you.

docs.title: Signing and Sending
docs.text:
If at step 3 you selected the option "korzystałem z pomocy publicznej de minimis" + the option "zaświadczenia", then now, at the last step before submitting the application, you need to attach the certificates (zaświadczenia) using the "Dodaj załączniki..." button.

Sign and send the document using the Podpisz i wyślij button.

The first option "Podpis profilem PUE" is recommended as the simplest to use.

docs.title: Success Criteria
docs.text:
You will see this message:

And in the sent documents (Dokumenty wysłane), the Wniosek RWS will appear:

docs.title: What's Next
docs.text:
Wait for a response from ZUS in your PUE/eZUS account. This may take several days. You will receive a notification about new messages at the email address or phone number you provided in PUE/eZUS.

First, you will receive Zawiadomienie o możliwości czynnego udziału w sprawie — this is an informational letter from ZUS that your application has been accepted for review. After that, within a few days, you will receive either a positive or negative decision about participating in ZUS vacation. In the case of a positive decision, the document is called Informacja o przyznaniu zwolnienia. The example shows a case where the vacation application was approved.

If you don't pay the voluntary składka chorobowa (the one for sick leave) and apply for the vacation, ZUS may at some point send something like this:

Zawiadomenie

Zakończyliśmy postępowanie w sprawie ustalenia prawa do zwolnienia z obowiązku opłacenia składek za czerwiec 2025 r., wszczętego na Pana wniosek z 29 maja 2025 r.

W wyniku weryfikacji stwierdziliśmy, że nie spełnia Pan następujących przesłanek ustawowych:

• nie podlegał Pan dobrowolnemu ubezpieczeniu chorobowemu w miesiącu złożenia wniosku albo w miesiącu go poprzedzającym

Może Pan wypowiedzieć się o zgromadzonej w Zakładzie dokumentacji w terminie 7 dni od daty doręczenia tego zawiadomienia.

Don't panic — this does not mean a full rejection of the vacation, just a denial of the składka chorobowa compensation. A few days after this, you'll receive the normal documents regarding the aid.

If your application is approved, you need to notify your accountant

If you handle your own accounting, see the section Monthly reports during ZUS vacation.

docs.title: Monthly Reports During ZUS Vacation
docs.text:
The entrepreneur must submit the following documents for themselves:

  • ZUS RCA 1: a personal social insurance report (składka na ubezpieczenie społeczne) accounting for the vacation. The report must specify the appropriate Kod tytułu ubezpieczenia - 0514 for Duży ZUS, 0574 for Składki preferencyjne, 0594 for Mały ZUS Plus.
  • ZUS RCA 2: a personal health insurance report (składka na ubezpieczenie zdrowotne) and, if applicable, voluntary sick leave contributions (dobrowolne ubezpieczenie chorobowe) without accounting for the vacation. The report must specify the current Kod tytułu ubezpieczenia - 0510 for Duży ZUS, 0570 for Składki preferencyjne, 0590 for Mały ZUS Plus.
  • ZUS DRA: a contributions declaration accounting for the vacation. In the declaration, in the social insurance payment sections (Składki finansowane przez sections), the values should be entered in the budżet państwa fields instead of ubezpieczonych.

The ZUS vacation benefit does not apply to employees. If the entrepreneur has employees, they must submit the following documents for them:

  • ZUS RCA: a personal report without accounting for the vacation.

docs.title: How to Generate Reports for ZUS Vacation
docs.text: If you use accounting software (Infakt, WFirma, iFirma), you can generate the reports using those tools. Otherwise, you can follow the instructions below. These instructions are written for a payer on Składki preferencyjne. The original version of this guide was developed by Olga Korneva.

docs.title: Report Creator for ZUS Vacation in PUE ZUS
docs.text:
Panel ePłatnik – Kreatory – Obsługa rozliczenia - Dalej.

Nowy komplet rozliczeniowy - Dalej.

The date field will be pre-filled; verify the remaining fields and click Dalej.

An informational message will pop up saying that ZUS RCA declarations will be generated — click Zamknij.

On the Rozliczenie ubezpieczonych panel, click Dane rozliczenia.

On the Dane rozliczenia panel, select element 057000 and click Edytuj.

On the panel, select the second tab Ubezpieczenie zdrowotne, wypłacone świadczenia.

Select the appropriate tax form. To select ryczałt, you need to scroll down.

In addition to the checkbox, for ryczałt you need to enter the income amount for the current calendar year (in the example — for 2024). Click Oblicz.

An informational message about the calculated base and health insurance contribution based on the provided data will pop up. Click Ok.

The corresponding fields are filled in automatically. Click Zapisz.

Return to the Dane rozliczenia panel and click Dalej.

On the Zestawenie panel, click Dalej.

On the Utworzenie i walidacja dokumentów panel, click Wylicz.

An informational message will pop up. Click Ok.

On the Utworzenie i walidacja dokumentów panel, click Weryfikuj.

The declarations will be verified.

docs.title: Reviewing the Created Declarations
docs.text:
To review the declarations, on the Utworzenie i walidacja dokumentów panel, select the desired element and click Podgląd.

Two ZUS RCA declarations will be generated within one ZUS RCA element. To view both declarations, use the navigation buttons shown in the screenshot.

The social insurance contributions (emerytalne, rentowe, chorobowe, wypadkowe) paid by the state will appear in the declaration with code 057400. In the screenshot below, these are fields 15, 16, 17, 18.

The social insurance contributions (emerytalne, rentowe, chorobowe, wypadkowe) paid by the entrepreneur will appear in the declaration with code 057000. In the screenshot below, these are fields 07, 08, 09, 10.

In the declaration with code 057000, the corresponding fields will contain the base and amount of the health insurance contribution (składka zdrowotna). Section III.C field 04 — this is the amount the insured entrepreneur must pay. The screenshot below shows the amount 699.11 zł, which may differ depending on your situation.

docs.title: Sending the Declarations
docs.text:
On the Utworzenie i walidacja dokumentów panel, click Wyślij i zakończ.

Sign the document using any of the listed methods.

After signing, the document will be sent to ZUS.

docs.title: Pitfalls
docs.text:
The benefit really is "free": the social insurance contributions you are exempted from are covered by the state budget. Nevertheless, there are a few nuances worth knowing about in advance:

  1. Ryczałt payers, watch the annual income limit for the składka zdrowotna rate. The vacation does not reduce your income, and the amounts saved on składki społeczne do not reduce your taxable base — as a result, savings of 300–1,000 zł can turn into an additional składka zdrowotna payment of 3,000–6,000 zł if you cross the threshold.
  2. Mały ZUS Plus. If you pay reduced income-based contributions, the benefit of the vacation is noticeably smaller — calculate whether it is worth the bureaucracy.
  3. Voluntary increased contributions. If you deliberately pay ZUS more than the minimum for the sake of your future pension, for the vacation month the state only compensates the minimum contribution amount.
  4. Accountants may charge extra for filling in the RWS application and the non-standard settlement with ZUS for the vacation month (we have seen 50 zł at iFirma and 200 zł at private accountants).
  5. The effect is delayed. Your ZUS payment will decrease not in the "vacation" month, but in the following month. And a month after that, the income tax due will be slightly higher — the saved składki społeczne will not reduce your taxable base.
  6. Switching from Preferencyjne to Duży ZUS. You will be exempted from składki społeczne in the minimum amount you were supposed to pay in the month preceding the month you submit the RWS application. In practice this means you cannot switch from Składki Preferencyjne to full ZUS (Duży ZUS) and get the exemption in the full Duży ZUS amount in the very first month. Nor in the second month.

Does the vacation affect applying for a residence card?

It has no effect at all. What matters is that the business has no break in activity or irregular income.

docs.title: You Don't Lose Anything
docs.text: The state will pay your contributions for that month — this has no effect on your pension savings. Unlike a "pause" (zawieszenie) or sick leave, during ZUS vacation the entrepreneur can continue conducting income-generating activity and issuing invoices.

docs.title: Conclusion
docs.text:
ZUS vacation is a great opportunity to reduce business expenses a bit and make your life easier. Just don't forget to carefully review the eligibility criteria and submit your application on time.

More detailed information about the benefits can be found on the official ZUS website.
